result.markdown:
--- title: "1. Data Quality Assessment" --- ## Assessment approach Before running any analysis, we systematically assessed the quality of each dataset along several dimensions. The table below summarizes the checks applied to each file. | Check | Description | |---|---| | **File overview** | Row and column counts; identification of structurally empty columns | | **Missing values** | Missing rate per variable, grouped by thematic block; flagging variables with meaningful missingness | | **Duplicates** | Check for duplicate student or record identifiers | | **Survey response quality** | Completion rate (`progress`) and response duration (`duration_min`) outliers | | **Range validity** | Expected value ranges checked across thematic blocks: demographics, academic background, computer lab, hours & study habits, aspirations, social network, salary beliefs, and math assessment | | **Derived variable consistency** | Cross-variable logical checks including scale average replication and reversal checks for reverse-coded items (e.g., grit, math enjoyment, math self-concept), as well as consistency between derived variables and their components (e.g., `educ_parent_max` vs. `educ_mother`/`educ_father`; math score totals vs. item sums) | Additional dataset-specific checks are described within each section below. Thresholds were set on substantive grounds based on the study codebook and instrument documentation. ::: {#b02f0705 .cell execution_count=1} ``` {.python .cell-code} import sys import importlib sys.path.insert(0, "../src") import utils import checks importlib.reload(utils) importlib.reload(checks) from great_tables import GT, style, loc, md import pandas as pd import numpy as np import matplotlib.pyplot as plt import seaborn as sns utils.set_theme() dfs = utils.load_all() baseline = dfs["baseline"] schools = dfs["schools"] math_chat = dfs["math_chat"] math_quiz = dfs["math_quiz"] voc_chat = dfs["voc_chat"] voc_steps = dfs["voc_steps"] ``` ::: --- ## Data sources The study draws on seven datasets from two sources: a Qualtrics baseline survey and interaction logs from the uDocz educational platform. | Dataset | Grain | Description | |---|---|---| | `baseline_estudiantes` | Student | Pre-treatment survey covering demographics, psychological scales, math assessment, and post-secondary aspirations | | `randomizacion_escuelas` | School | School-level treatment assignment and stratification variables used for randomization | | `math_chat_casa` | Message | Student–AI math tutoring conversations conducted at home | | `math_chat_escuela` | Message | Student–AI math tutoring conversations conducted at school, with topic and correctness data | | `math_ponte_prueba` | Quiz attempt | Math quiz interactions from the platform, with correctness indicators | | `voc_chat` | Message | Student–AI career guidance conversations across an 8-step vocational journey | | `voc_steps` | Student × step | Student-level progress, time spent, and completion across the 8 vocational journey steps | --- --- ## Dataset assessments Each dataset is assessed on a dedicated page. Detailed findings, tables, and recommendations are available within each report. ```{=html}
Dataset Key issues Recommendations
Baseline student data
View report →
  • Math assessment correctness systematically miscoded (9/10 items, ~200 affected students each)
  • Near zero internal consistency for all four main psychological scales (Grit, Locus of Control, Self-efficacy, and Metacognition)
  • Several variables contain sentinel or out-of-range codes requiring recoding
  • 93 students flagged for low response quality
  • Verify scoring logic against de-anonymized data and original answer key; recode affected observations and recompute total score
  • Check whether Qualtrics randomized response options; verify inter-item correlations in de-anonymized data before using scale averages
  • Recode all sentinel and out-of-range values to missing as a mandatory preprocessing step
  • Rerun main analyses excluding flagged students as a robustness check; verify gender coding against de-anonymized data
Schools randomization Pending Pending
Math chat logs Pending Pending
Math quiz Pending Pending
Vocational chat Pending Pending
Vocational steps Pending Pending
```
